skill.name: file-uploads
skill.description: Guides secure file upload workflows for cloud storage, presigned URLs, multipart uploads, file validation, and image optimization.
skill.summary: Build secure, efficient upload flows for S3, Cloudflare R2, and large file handling.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: The static finding for weak cryptographic algorithm at SKILL.md:3 is a false positive. Line 3 describes presigned URLs and multipart uploads, but it contains no cryptographic algorithm or implementation. No prompt injection, exfiltration, network code, filesystem access, scripts, or external commands were found.

content.value_statement: File uploads are hard to scale and easy to secure incorrectly. This skill guides cloud storage, validation, presigned URLs, and large upload handling.
actual_capabilities: Explains secure upload patterns for S3 and Cloudflare R2.
Recommends presigned URLs instead of server-side upload proxying.
Highlights validation needs such as magic bytes, size limits, and filename sanitization.
Covers multipart upload strategies for large files.
Provides guidance for image optimization in upload workflows.
limitations: It is a documentation-only skill and does not include executable code.
It does not configure cloud buckets or IAM policies directly.
It does not inspect uploaded files or verify runtime security controls.
Provider-specific SDK details may require current vendor documentation.

use_cases.title: Design an Upload Architecture
use_cases.description: Plan a secure direct-to-storage upload flow before implementation.

use_cases.title: Review Upload Security
use_cases.description: Check whether an existing upload design covers validation, limits, and path traversal risks.

use_cases.title: Improve Large File Handling
use_cases.description: Choose multipart upload patterns that avoid blocking application servers.

prompt_templates.title: Plan a Basic Upload Flow
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me design a secure file upload flow for a web app using cloud object storage.

prompt_templates.title: Add Validation Controls
prompt_templates.prompt: Review my upload requirements and list validation controls for file type, size, and filename safety.

prompt_templates.title: Use Presigned URLs
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a presigned URL upload workflow for S3 or Cloudflare R2 with safe expiration and access controls.

prompt_templates.title: Scale Multipart Uploads
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a large-file upload strategy with multipart uploads, retry behavior, image optimization, and cleanup rules.

output_examples.input: I need uploads for profile images.
output_examples.output: A recommended plan includes magic-byte validation, image resizing, size limits, safe filenames, and direct storage uploads.

output_examples.input: My users upload videos larger than two gigabytes.
output_examples.output: The skill would recommend multipart uploads, resumable client behavior, server-side completion tracking, and cleanup for failed uploads.

output_examples.input: Can I trust the file extension from the browser?
output_examples.output: The expected guidance is no. Validate content type with file signatures and enforce independent size and storage rules.

best_practices: Validate file content with magic bytes, not only extensions or browser headers.
Use short-lived presigned URLs with clear ownership and permission boundaries.
Set explicit upload size limits and cleanup rules for incomplete uploads.
anti_patterns: Do not trust client-provided filenames, extensions, or content types.
Do not proxy large uploads through application servers without a strong reason.
Do not cache or share presigned URLs beyond their intended user and time window.

faq.question: Does this skill execute upload code?
faq.answer: No. It provides guidance only and contains no executable scripts.

faq.question: Which storage providers does it mention?
faq.answer: It mentions S3 and Cloudflare R2 as cloud object storage targets.

faq.question: Does it support large files?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes guidance for multipart uploads and avoiding server blocking.

faq.question: Does it help with upload security?
faq.answer: Yes. It emphasizes file type validation, size limits, filename sanitization, and presigned URL control.

faq.question: Can it optimize images automatically?
faq.answer: No. It can guide image optimization design, but it does not process images itself.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The reviewed file is documentation only and no confirmed security issues were found.
